source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as [FIRST_NAME]
,cst.LastName as [LAST_NAME]
,cst.Email as [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
,cst.Phone as [PHONE_NUMBER]
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,'English' as [LANGUAGE]
,'US' as [COUNTRY]
,'FHI' as [BRAND_NAME]
,'' AS CHANNEL
,job.contractid AS CONTRACT_ID
,job.cst_id AS ACCOUNT_ID
--,CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'')
--ELSE CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CASE WHEN (CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL) OR (CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL) THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR)) END END END END AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_ID
--,CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),'')
--ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName))
--ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName))
--ELSE CASE WHEN (TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp1.LastName,emp1.FirstName)) IS NULL) OR (TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL and TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NULL) THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName))
--ELSE CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName),';',Concat(emp4.LastName,' ',emp4.FirstName)) 
--END END END END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_ID
, CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp1.Name END AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp2.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp3.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp4.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_NAME
,brp.LongName as PRODUCTION_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT('FHI-',brn.id) as BranchID
,mld.ActDate as SERVICE_DATETIME
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,ISNULL((select rpm.descr from [ODS].[LP_FHI_rpm_ReportingMarket] rpm where id=brn.rpm_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,ISNULL((select tof.descr from [ODS].[LP_FHI_tof_TypeOfMarket] tof where id=brn.tof_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET_TYPE  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,ISNULL(CAST(job.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp5.FirstName,' ',emp5.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp6.FirstName,' ',emp6.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE,fulv.Descr as FIELD_SUPERVISOR
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_FHI_job_Jobs] job
left join ODS.LP_FHI_ulv_UserLookupValues fulv on job.job_user_16=fulv.id
left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds on job.lds_id=lds.LeadNumber
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_cst_Customers] cst on job.cst_id = cst.id
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_prd_Products] prd on job.ProductID = prd.ProductID
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_ins_Installers] emp1 on job.ins_installer1=emp1.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_ins_Installers] emp2 on job.ins_installer2=emp2.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_ins_Installers] emp3 on job.ins_installer3=emp3.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_ins_Installers] emp4 on job.ins_installer4=emp4.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_prg_Product_Groups] prg on prd.prg_id = prg.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_brp_ProductionBranches] brp on job.brp_id = brp.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld on job.id = mld.job_id
 INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_mdt_MilestoneDateTypes] mdt on mld.mdt_id = mdt.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_FHI_brn_Branches] brn on brp.id=brn.id --Add Reporting Market and Type request
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp5 on job.slr_id=emp5.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_emp_Employees] emp6 on job.slr_id2=emp6.id
 left join [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs] srs on lds.srs_id=srs.id
WHERE  
mdt.Descr = 'Complete'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 0 and 30 --20260323: As per Request from Selena, Logic has been changed to send dtaa between 3 and 30 days from 0 to 30 days.
-- 20260414 : Another ask from Selena to change back to 0 days delay since East Division is already applying certain logic which is sending the Leads with a delay.
and CAST(mld.ActDate as DATE)>='2024-08-30'

dependsOn.activity: Truncate Install Exp Invite Staging table

LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_MXH_ins_Installers] emp2 on job.ins_installer2=emp2.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_MXH_ins_Installers] emp3 on job.ins_installer3=emp3.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_MXH_ins_Installers] emp4 on job.ins_installer4=emp4.id
left join [ODS].[LP_MXH_emp_Employees] emp5 on job.slr_id=emp5.id

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as [FIRST_NAME]
,cst.LastName as [LAST_NAME]
,cst.Email as [EMAIL_ADDRESS]
,cst.Phone as [PHONE_NUMBER]
,CONCAT(cst.Address1,' ',cst.Address2) as [ADDRESS]
,cst.City as [CITY]
,cst.[State] as [STATE]
,cst.Zip as ZIP
,'English' as [LANGUAGE]
,'US' as [COUNTRY]
,case when prd.productid in  ('Garg','Garage CV') then 'REN' else 'CTA' end as [BRAND_NAME]
,'' AS CHANNEL
,job.contractid AS CONTRACT_ID
,job.cst_id AS ACCOUNT_ID
--,CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'')
--ELSE CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CASE WHEN CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CASE WHEN (CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL) OR (CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR) IS NULL AND CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR) IS NULL) THEN CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR))
--ELSE CONCAT(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),';',CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR)) END END END END AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_ID
--,CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NULL THEN ISNULL(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),'')
--ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName))
--ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp3.LastName,emp3.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName))
--ELSE CASE WHEN (TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL AND TRIM(Concat(emp1.LastName,emp1.FirstName)) IS NULL) OR (TRIM(Concat(emp4.LastName,emp4.FirstName)) IS NULL and TRIM(Concat(emp2.LastName,emp2.FirstName)) IS NULL) THEN CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName))
--ELSE CONCAT(Concat(emp1.LastName,' ',emp1.FirstName),';',Concat(emp2.LastName,' ',emp2.FirstName),';',Concat(emp3.LastName,' ',emp3.FirstName),';',Concat(emp4.LastName,' ',emp4.FirstName)) 
--END END END END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_ID
, CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer1 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp1.Name END AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_1_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer2 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp2.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_2_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer3 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp3.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_3_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR),'0') AS SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_ID
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.ins_installer4 as VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE emp4.Name END as SERVICE_TECHNICIAN_4_NAME
,brp.LongName as PRODUCTION_BRANCH_NAME
,CONCAT(case when prd.productid in  ('Garg','Garage CV') then 'REN-' else 'CTA-' end,brn.id) as BranchID
,mld.ActDate as SERVICE_DATETIME
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,ISNULL((select rpm.descr from [ODS].[LP_CTA_rpm_ReportingMarket] rpm where id=brn.rpm_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,ISNULL((select tof.descr from [ODS].[LP_CTA_tof_TypeOfMarket] tof where id=brn.tof_id),'Undefined') as REPORTING_MARKET_TYPE  --Add Reporting Market and Type request
,ISNULL(CAST(job.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_1
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.[slr_id] AS VARCHAR),'0')= '0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp5.FirstName,' ',emp5.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_1_NAME
,ISNULL(CAST(job.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0') as SALES_REP_ID_2
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(job.[slr_id2] AS VARCHAR),'0')='0' THEN 'NONE' ELSE CONCAT(emp6.FirstName,' ',emp6.LastName) END AS SALES_REP_2_NAME
,srs.SourceCode as LEADSOURCE,'NA' as FIELD_SUPERVISOR
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_CTA_job_Jobs] job
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_cst_Customers] cst on job.cst_id = cst.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_prd_Products] prd on job.ProductID = prd.ProductID
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_prg_Product_Groups] prg on prd.prg_id = prg.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_brp_ProductionBranches] brp on job.brp_id = brp.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld on job.id = mld.job_id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_mdt_MilestoneDateTypes] mdt on mld.mdt_id = mdt.id
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_brn_Branches] brn on brp.id=brn.id --Add Reporting Market and Type request
INNER JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_Lds_Leads] leads on leads.id = job.lds_id --To ignore Kohler records
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_ins_Installers] emp1 on job.ins_installer1=emp1.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_ins_Installers] emp2 on job.ins_installer2=emp2.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_ins_Installers] emp3 on job.ins_installer3=emp3.id
LEFT JOIN [ODS].[LP_CTA_ins_Installers] emp4 on job.ins_installer4=emp4.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_emp_Employees] emp5 on job.slr_id=emp5.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_emp_Employees] emp6 on job.slr_id2=emp6.id
left join [ODS].[LP_CTA_srs_SourceSubs] srs on srs.id=leads.srs_id
WHERE 
mdt.Descr = 'Job Completed 100%'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) between 3 and 30 --20260323: As per Request from Selena, Logic has been changed to send dtaa between 3 and 30 days from 3 to 30 days.
--and leads.src_id not like 'kohler%' 
and CAST(mld.ActDate as DATE)>='2024-08-28'
